input: session-item interaction graph (items connected to sessions and to each other via order/co-occurrence)
output: ranked list of next-item recommendations for a given session
loss: not specified (probabilistic/co-occurrence based, no explicit loss function)
key_idea: use graph structures (sequential triplets and co-occurrence probabilities) to generate recommendations without neural networks
datasets: four session-based datasets (one proprietary from a leather apparel e-shop)
